steps.objective: Understand the main problem and contribution
questions_to_answer: What is the main problem addressed in the paper?
steps.expected_output: Understand the main problem and the proposed Transformer model

questions_to_answer: What motivates the use of attention mechanisms?
What background knowledge is required to understand the paper?
steps.expected_output: Understand the motivation and background of the paper

steps.objective: Understand the main findings and implications
questions_to_answer: What are the main findings of the paper?
What are the implications of the proposed model?
steps.expected_output: Understand the main findings and implications of the paper

questions_to_answer: What are the components of the Transformer model?
How is it used in the Transformer model?
steps.expected_output: Understand the attention mechanism and its role in the Transformer model

steps.objective: Understand the evaluation setup and results
questions_to_answer: What are the evaluation metrics used?
What are the results of the experiments?
steps.expected_output: Understand the evaluation setup and results of the experiments

steps.objective: Understand the scaled dot-product attention mechanism
questions_to_answer: What is the scaled dot-product attention mechanism?
How is it used in the Transformer model?
steps.expected_output: Understand the scaled dot-product attention mechanism and its role in the Transformer model

steps.objective: Understand the rationale behind using self-attention
questions_to_answer: Why is self-attention used in the Transformer model?
What are the benefits of using self-attention?
steps.expected_output: Understand the rationale behind using self-attention in the Transformer model

steps.objective: Understand the training process and hyperparameters
steps.expected_output: Understand the training process and hyperparameters used in the paper

final_user_task.summary_task: Summarize the main findings and implications of the paper
reflection_questions: What are the main contributions of the paper?
What are the potential applications of the proposed model?
What are the limitations of the paper and potential future work?
